action.reasoning: Observation: Best mean_r2 still 0.303 (iter11, select-on-r2_q, 50 epochs) but checkpoint overwritten; latest best.pt (15 epochs similar config) scores 0.232 with r2_q=-0.087 despite clip[-50,50] and val_r2_q=0.17. Time critically low (~2min left), no retrain possible. Val maxabs(t_tend~23, q~3, rad/precip~3). Analysis: Test dist-shift causes q-outliers hurting R2 (sensitive to large errors); uniform wide clip insufficient, per-component clipping matched to val stats will cap extremes while preserving good components (t/rad/precip). Curves show early plateau, selection on r2_q helped before. Decision: Update only predict.py for grouped clipping (t:[-25,25], q/others:[-4,4]), add pre/post stats, submit_eval on current checkpoints/best.pt immediately (fast inference). This should yield positive r2_q and mean_r2 >0.23 without training.
